perks.summary: load a velocyto .loom (optionally merge a processed .h5ad for UMAP/clusters) into a single .h5ad with spliced/unspliced layers
filter_and_normalize + neighbors + moments (first/second-order) on spliced/unspliced layers, write a moments-ready .h5ad
fit RNA velocity (stochastic/deterministic/dynamical recover_dynamics) + velocity_graph, write a velocity-annotated .h5ad
compute shared latent time from the dynamical model (adds obs['latent_time']) and write the updated .h5ad
compute velocity_pseudotime + velocity_confidence + velocity_length per cell, write the updated .h5ad
rank_velocity_genes per cluster group (min_corr filter) and export the per-group driver-gene table as CSV
render a velocity embedding plot (stream / grid / arrows) on a basis (umap) coloured by a group key, to PNG
end-to-end RNA velocity pipeline in one command: preprocess -> velocity -> graph -> latent time -> confidence -> pseudotime -> driver genes -> figures -> .h5ad
